generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorFeedback : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Feedback from cart motor controller for movement status"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorFeedbackDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistMotorFeedback : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Feedback from hoist motor controller for movement status"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorFeedbackDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartMotorFeedbackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorFeedback
]

instance HoistMotorFeedbackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorFeedback
]

instance SwingAngleTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of hoist swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, ContinuousValidation
]

instance WindSpeedTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, ContinuousValidation
]

instance CartMotorFeedbackTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of cart motor controller feedback"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorFeedbackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, ContinuousValidation
]

instance HoistMotorFeedbackTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of hoist motor controller feedback"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorFeedbackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, ContinuousValidation
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container handling"
]

instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane structure created using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, RealTimeSimulation
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for optimal trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimalTrajectoryGeneration
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics for real-time simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeSimulation, ContinuousValidation
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for service deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, RealTimeSimulation, ContinuousValidation, HistoricalDataLogging, VisualizationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data logging and validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging, ContinuousValidation
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for trajectory traces and validation results"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for communication between services"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging, ContinuousValidation, VisualizationService
]

instance GantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for crane control and data handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, RealTimeSimulation, ContinuousValidation
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for monitoring physical sensing components"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging, ContinuousValidation
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, RealTimeSimulation
]

instance Pip : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python package manager for module installation"
    DTDFVocab:enables GantrylibModule
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGeneration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of optimal trajectories using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAction
]

instance RealTimeSimulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResults
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous comparison of real measurements with simulations to detect deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlerts
]

instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logging of time-series data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAccess
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of trajectory traces and validation results via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryVisualization
]

instance TrajectoryVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of crane trajectory traces in Grafana dashboard"
]

instance ValidationAlerts : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for deviations between real measurements and simulations"
]

instance SimulationResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from real-time simulation of crane dynamics"
]

instance HistoricalDataAccess : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to historical time-series data for analysis"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to move crane along optimal trajectory"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GantryCraneDTSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system for lab-scale gantry crane"
    base:contains TimescaleDB, GrafanaDashboard, OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, RealTimeSimulation, ContinuousValidation, MQTTBroker
]

]

    base:desc "Evolution documented via DarTwin notation"
]

instance CustomDriverBoard : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom driver board to reduce cost"
]

instance PhysicalSimulator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical simulator for virtual commissioning"
]

instance HarborSystemExpansion : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Harbor system expansion for teaching"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control Application sends movement commands through Physical Crane Interface to control cart and hoist motors, executing trajectories generated by Trajectory Generator Service."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logging and validation during operation; no explicit time intervals specified but continuous validation service operates in real-time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system with physical containers (Physical Crane, Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, Human Machine Interface) and digital twin containers (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, MQTT Broker) deployed on a single personal computer."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily covers 'as operated' phase for continuous validation and control; CAD models used for design phase representation; used in teaching for harbor system expansion including ship and container loading simulations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements with simulation outputs using distance metrics; thresholds for acceptable deviation trigger operator alerts; model validation techniques reused from prior research for verification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for communication between physical interface and digital services; data transmitted via Python applications to TimescaleDB database."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a personal computer with Docker containers for TimescaleDB database, Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard; Python gantrylib module deployed locally."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "No specific standards followed; ad-hoc implementation using general open-source tools without dedicated digital twin frameworks."
]
